title: pleurogyne minor
intro: Pleurogyne minor, also known as California peppergrass, is a perennial herb native to the western coast of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and acting as a natural cough suppressant. Pleurogyne minor can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine.
